results.title: Equals
results.overview: A futuristic love story set in a world where emotions have been eradicated.

results.title: Equals
results.overview: Álex and Ruth meet through a dating app, immediately become inseparable, move in together, and live as a happy couple, until Álex notices that Ruth is experimenting certain changes.

results.title: Equals
results.overview: An omnibus film on children's rights and the problems that the youngest members of our society have to face. Each story tackles a specific theme and has its own hero.

results.title: Equals
results.overview: In Jerusalem On Night A Latino Hipster Named "Alejandro" Met an Orthodox Jew School Girl name "Duffy" and fall in Love after he saved his life from a beating cop, but what Separate them for be together is the norms of the Community In the Big City

results.title: Amongst Equals
results.overview: Zubrycki’s controversial, provocative and rarely screened documentary about the Australian trade-union movement was originally commissioned by the ACTU and funded by the Bicentennial Authority to provide an audio-visual history stretching from the birth of the movement in the mid-1850s and the formation of the Australian Labor Party to key events like the 1891 shearers’ strike and the 1988 Bicentenary. This pro-union but objective history, focusing on the struggle between capital and labour, and featuring the candid testimony of many unionists, was refused sanction by the ACTU and has long languished in obscurity aside from some “illegal” screenings in the early 1990s.

results.title: Plus Equals
results.overview: Plus Equals follows a man who discovers a strange suitcase. He assumes ownership of it. A mania sets in, by the man's obsession with this bag's extraordinary abilities. Has he really owned this bag or does the bag end up owning him?

results.title: Debt equals Death
results.overview: HE IS DANGEROUS.  Noah is sent to deliver blade his money but gets mugged on the way.

results.title: Labour Equals Freedom
results.overview: Peter is in his early forties and until recently he worked in a factory, but after Slovenia's integration into the European Union, the factory closed down and Peter and his colleagues have been made redundant. Slowly but surely, he is losing self-confidence and self-esteem.

results.title: Misery Equals Comfort
results.overview: This film explores 21st century social dysfunction through the eyes of two fictional female characters, Reed and Sara

results.title: Circle Equals Square
results.overview: A divorcee attempts to navigate an awkward battery of speed dating prospects in hopes of making a connection.

results.title: One equals one
results.overview: Two suns cannot shine in one sphere.

results.title: Taiwan Equals Love
results.overview: In 2016, the parties of the Taiwan Legislative Yuan submitted drafts on the marriage equality act but were confronted with anti-LGBTQ groups. Meanwhile, three pairs of same-sex partners are also facing their own family issues. Tien-Ming and Hsiang have been in love for more than 30 years, but their love is being tested with old-age and illness. Jovi and Mindy spend most of their time protesting for marriage equality, fighting for the rights of Jovi's daughter. Gu flew from Macau to live with Shinchi but is now struggling with finances and the pressure to come out to their parents...

results.title: THE RESIDENTS - EQUALS E
results.overview: From the CUBE-E Box Set released in 2006.  Night Music - From The Plains To Mexico  Night Music - Teddy Bear  Tele 5 - Buckaroo Blues  Rehearsal - Cowell Theater  Rehearsal For Lincoln Center  20 Twisted Questions Clips  Interview With Hardy Fox (1989)

results.title: One Plus One Equals Three
results.overview: Every teenager in the small town of Scarboro, NC, goes to summer camp - siblings Jude and Rebecca are no exception. However, they soon discover that something more mysterious is happening at the camp than meets the eye.

results.title: Ed Sheeran: The Equals Live Experience
results.original_title: Ed Sheeran: The Equals Live Experience
results.overview: Ed Sheeran performs an array of brand new tracks from his latest album. This concert experience will take you on a transformative audio-visual journey with the singer-songwriter, exploring the themes of metamorphosis and renewal that define his fifth studio album.

results.title: Patton Oswalt: Tragedy Plus Comedy Equals Time
results.original_title: Patton Oswalt: Tragedy Plus Comedy Equals Time
results.overview: Performing for a packed house at Spreckels Theater in San Diego, comedian Patton Oswalt delivers a blistering stand-up set in his trademark blend of acerbic wit and unabashed silliness. His topics include a wide array of modern issues, from the future of our nation to daddy/daughter outings gone wrong.

results.title: Work Equals Weight Times Distance
results.original_title: 仕事＝重サ×距離 三菱長崎造船所からのレポート

results.title: First Among Equals: The Laurie Cunningham Story
results.original_title: First Among Equals: The Laurie Cunningham Story
results.overview: Documentary covering the trailblazing career and tragically short life of Laurie Cunningham, the English football star of the '70s and '80s.

results.title: The Thirsty Flower: Four by Four Equals One
results.original_title: 渇いた花　～four by four equal one ～
results.overview: The title is "Thirsty Flower ~ four by four equal one ~", which is a short story of about 60 minutes with four women as the main characters.

results.title: The Black Artists' Group: Creation Equals Movement
results.original_title: The Black Artists' Group: Creation Equals Movement
results.overview: The Black Artists’ Group of St. Louis (BAG) formed in the late 1960s as an arts collective devoted to  raising Black consciousness, battling social injustice, and exploring the far reaches of experimental  performance.
